'''Fire beetles''' were tiny red bioluminescent insects native to [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. They could be found illuminating the tunnels of the [[Fleebog]]s.<ref name="EW11" />

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Ewoks (1985) 11|''Ewoks'' (1985) 11]] {{1st}}
